title: Allow Details pane to show ALL Field values, not just Updates | Files | Activity Log | Info Box tabs

posts.author: Casey_M (Casey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Current behavior: When you click the expand icon (two opposing arrows) to “Open [item name] page”, the Details pane opens, showing only the Updates | Files | Activity Log | Info Boxes tabs.

I’d like it to instead also provide an “at a glance” view of all Field values. It is very difficult to get a birds-eye view of an item or record because you have to scroll left to right to see all of the values.

It would be very helpful to have functionality similar to tools like Asana and Airtable. When you open one of their records, it shows all of the left to right column/fields all in one place. So each field in this image below corresponds with a field/column in the main board/project.
Screenshot of Airtable for reference: Monday.com functionality re...

What are you trying to achieve

Improve visibility of record details. As tables/projects grow and the number of fields increases, it’s really clunky to see what each record shows by scrolling left to right.
Having the tabs and an overview of all the field values would be so helpful for navigation.

posts.author: mlamkins (Maddie)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve found adding an Item Card view to be really helpful for seeing details of an item at a glance - https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360017143959-The-Item-Card
